title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
